reviews.review_title: A handful of songs with Youtube ads!
reviews.review_description:
Just a handful of songs, and it started with Youtube showings ads! 
Third star for the potential and the fact that it's free - so people can try and see. But as of now I see no point of playing this app.
I love this game honestly but you need more songs on there cuz most of those songs are kind of boring to do you need more fast-paced songs

reviews.review_title: Update you need to hit the walls!
reviews.review_description:
My bad! My initial review was that the  it was impossible to avoid the glass walls, you actually need to punch them! It's alot of fun.

Some feedback.

1. There is some.slowdown/slow framerate on the game especially when hitting the walls.

2. Make it so you need to hit the targets not just stick your arms out much better for a workout! Give more points for hitting targets but also space them out so you can  hit them.

Lovely background as well! Keep up the great work!!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for updating me,

I'll look into solving these two issues  ^_^

reviews.review_description:
I really hope you enjoy the game
if you need any help or wanna provide feedback, join me on Discord:
https://discord.gg/MEcbBRAfNk

Thanks ^_^
